items.text: Used a professional email address (e.g., firstname.lastname@domain.com).
Included a current phone number with country/area code.
Listed only City, Country rather than a full street address for safety.
Provided a clean, direct link to your LinkedIn profile.
Removed profile photo (unless standard in your specific region/industry).
Kept the layout to a single column to ensure ATS compatibility.
Removed tables, text boxes, progress bars, icons, or graphics.
Limited CV to 1 page (under 10 years experience) or 2 pages maximum.
Used a clean, professional font (10-12pt body, slightly larger headings).
Maintained generous margins (0.5 to 1 inch) and proper spacing.
Summary is concise (2-3 sentences or bullet points maximum).
Omitted old-fashioned objective statements; focused on what you offer.
Clearly frames your professional identity and key value proposition.
Started every single bullet point with a strong, active verb in past tense.
Quantified results wherever possible (percentages, dollar amounts, time saved).
Structured bullets as: Action Verb + Task + Measurable Result.
Tailored experience to match the target job description requirements.
Listed roles in strict reverse-chronological order (newest first).
Created a clean, separate section for hard skills, tools, and platforms.
Matched exact terms and acronyms from the target job posting.
Avoided spamming or stacking keywords unnaturally.
